name: Homemade Brownie Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Stir with a wire whisk until evenly distributed.
3. Transfer to a large airtight container.
4. Label with date and contents.
5. Store in a cool, dry place.
6. Use within 10-12 weeks.
Makes about 15 cups of Brownie Mix.
